name: Phil Spector

acts.description: Convicted of second-degree murder of actress Lana Clarkson in 2003
History of threatening behavior with firearms, reported by multiple artists he worked with

behavior_summary: Invented the Wall of Sound production technique. Also shot and killed a woman in his mansion. Died in prison in 2021.

art.summary: Invented the Wall of Sound. Produced some of the most influential records in pop history. A foundational genius of recorded music.

verdict.blurb: He made Ronnie Spector wear a wig of his ex-wife's hair and wouldn't let her leave the house. Then he shot someone. The Wall of Sound is extraordinary. The man who built it was a violent captor and a murderer. He died in prison. The records live on.
